evidence: "I loved the message and story of this movie. Excellent for whole family."
"I especially liked it because it is a story about older adults having the time of their lives."
"This movie is very slow and often confusing as it flashes back to the past leaving the viewer to figure out what that has to do with his present state."
"This movie is very slow and when you go and make a sandwich and come back you wonder how all this ties together."
"This movie is very slow and often confusing as it flashes back to the past... boring until the end."
"I really enjoy Gerard Butler and he does a great job in this movie along with the other actors."
"I generally like the movies Gerald Butler plays in and I liked his role in this movie."
"This is a heart warming story about a common person (whom queen Latifah plays so well)..."
"Enjoyed seeing the awesome scenery and tremendous waves--WOW!!!"
"I loved the message and story of this movie."

summary: The user enjoys family-oriented and heartwarming films, particularly those featuring older adults. They prefer simple narratives with slower pacing, and they appreciate strong performances from familiar actors like Gerard Butler and Queen Latifah.
